revisedPrompt: Create a polished, cinematic 16:9 key art image for a tranquil puzzle-game prototype, using the attached references only for their visual art direction and atmosphere. Show a coherent journey with a clear visual intro, gameplay space, and outro within one continuous Chinese garden scene: in the foreground, an inviting stone entry path and open moon gate establish the intro; in the center, a crystal-clear turquoise koi pond is divided into an elegant, subtle square grid for a measured jumping puzzle, with a small charming jade-green frog poised on one tile and gentle ripple markers suggesting a path; in the background, the route resolves at a warm, softly illuminated pavilion beyond a graceful arched wooden bridge, creating a satisfying outro and destination. Surround the pond with lotus flowers, lily pads, koi, willow branches, ornamental rocks, reeds, cherry blossoms, and refined traditional garden architecture. Rich painterly realism, serene golden-hour light, sophisticated teal, moss green, coral, warm wood, and muted gold palette, atmospheric depth, premium game concept art, detailed but uncluttered, harmonious and readable composition. No interface, no words, no title, no logos, no icons, no watermark, and absolutely no branding.
prompt: the imagegen should also provide a proper intro and outro for the prototype. It should be coherent with the prototype and should be inspired of validated track from EX-0002 and EX-0003. Don't use any branding on the final rendered image. only the art style

ownerApproval.ownerWording: the intro image is perfect. we lock that now.
ownerApproval.changeRule: Do not regenerate, replace, edit, crop into a derivative file, or alter the source pixels without a new explicit owner decision. Responsive CSS object-position and readability overlays may be tuned only if the approved image remains recognizable and its source file digest stays unchanged.

integrationReview.role: Replaceable full-bleed narrative intro bookend behind authored title, explanation, and start control.
integrationReview.stateBoundary: The image is empty-alt and aria-hidden. Its frog, ripples, and decorative pond grid do not define a quantity, endpoint, accepted answer, trace, or interactive geometry; all playable state remains authored in HTML and SVG after the intro.
integrationReview.cropSafety: Desktop and mobile use object-fit cover with responsive object-position. The authored copy remains outside the image semantics and retains contrast through a separate CSS light field.
integrationReview.noBrandingReview: Manual review found no readable text, logo, watermark, trademark, copied title treatment, or recognizable branded character.
integrationReview.claimBoundary: The image supports narrative and production coherence only. It is not learning evidence, accessibility equivalence, efficacy evidence, or promotion authority.
